name: Metabase
description: Open source business intelligence and analytics platform. Create dashboards and explore data without writing SQL.
questions: Is there a cloud-hosted version available?
Does it support SSO and SAML authentication?
instructions: Focus on new data source connectors, dashboard features, embedding capabilities, enterprise features, and any licensing or pricing changes.

alternatives.name: Redash
alternatives.comment: Open source, query-focused, simpler feature set.

alternatives.name: Apache Superset
alternatives.comment: Apache-licensed, rich visualisation library, steeper setup curve.

alternatives.name: Grafana
alternatives.comment: Primarily metrics/time-series but increasingly used for general BI.

alternatives.name: Hex
alternatives.comment: Close source, enterprise focus, AI Analytics Platform for your whole team
